chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3860 of 2015 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No.28953/2015 2. For hearing of Misc. No.17225/2015 3. For hearing of main case 11.03.2025 Mr. Darvesh K. Mandhan, advocate the petitioner Mr. Muhammad Khalil Dogar, advocate for respondent No.2. Mr. Kashif Nazir, Assistant Attorney General It is jointly stated that this petition may be disposed of with directions that fate of security shall be subject to the outcome of the S.C.R.A.. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
